task_completion.description: Set Receiver nodes on ROBOT_A to channel 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or node properties panel, the 'channel' field for the Receiver node(s) under ROBOT_A is set to 1.

task_completion.description: Set Receiver nodes on ROBOT_B to channel 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or node properties panel, the 'channel' field for the Receiver node(s) under ROBOT_B is set to 1.

task_completion.description: Update all Emitter range values to 15.0 meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or node properties panel, the 'range' field for the Emitter nodes (under the robots) is modified to 15.0.

task_completion.description: Add a Receiver node to ROBOT_C
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, a new 'Receiver' node is visible in the hierarchy of ROBOT_C (e.g., added to its children or extensionSlot).

task_completion.description: Set ROBOT_C's new Receiver channel to 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly added Receiver node under ROBOT_C has its 'channel' field explicitly set to 1 in the node properties.

A 'Save World As' dialog targeting '/home/ga/Desktop/warehouse_comms.wbt', the Webots window title bar updating to 'warehouse_comms.wbt', or a terminal/file manager verifying the file's creation on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Webots GUI to modify the simulation world
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Webots Scene Tree and Node Properties panels, rather than exclusively editing the .wbt file in a text editor or using terminal commands like sed.

integrity.description: Agent used the application interface to add the Receiver node
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Webots 'Add Node' dialog box being opened and used to insert the Receiver node into ROBOT_C.

integrity.description: Agent saved the world from within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using the 'File -> Save World As...' menu option in Webots to generate the final output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Desktop/warehouse_comms.wbt. Target Emitter/Receiver channel: 1. Target transmission range: 15.0 meters. Robots involved: ROBOT_A, ROBOT_B, ROBOT_C.
